title: Omkar Realtors is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Omkar Realtors is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Omkar Realtors. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Omkar Realtors:
Omkar Realtors is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omkar Realtors!
